title: P&L tab — realized P&L aggregates (closed-only, IST) + cumulative chart
acceptance_criteria: pnl.ts exports PURE functions that take PaperTrade[] and compute: total realized net P&L over status==='closed' trades ONLY, today's realized P&L (closed trades whose exit date is IST-today), win rate (winners / closed count, guarding divide-by-zero -> 0), open count, closed count, and a cumulative-P&L series ordered by exit_time for closed trades. All money math uses T-04 null-safe coercion; null/missing values are skipped, never summed as 0-from-NaN.

PnlView consumes the SHARED usePaperTrades hook from T-02 (does not refetch). It renders the aggregates labeled honestly — the total is 'Realized P&L (closed trades)', open positions shown as a separate count, never an invented unrealized number.
Cumulative-P&L rendered with Lightweight Charts; chart handles 0, 1, and many points without crashing.
Distinct empty state (no closed trades yet) and error state (propagated from usePaperTrades) — error must not render as flat 0.00 / 0% as if it were a real no-activity day.
Vitest tests in pnl.test.ts cover: closed-only filtering, null P&L exclusion, divide-by-zero win rate, IST today-boundary selection, and cumulative series ordering.
Named exports only; TypeScript strict passes.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
